response: {"creativity-rating":5,"creativity-free-response":"This was an amazing game with a highly creative concept, the way physics of balls played the overall role, and how the notes should be hit can make the level design in this game extremely challenging and fun.","originality-rating":4,"originality-free-response":"The game did feel somewhat novel with the way it can be used to play music by making the player hit notes as per instructions ","effectiveness-rating":5,"effectiveness-free-response":"The game was very enjoyable, but at times it was frustrating to hit all the notes without spamming the balls, so with a limited number of balls, the game can easily become extremely frustrating.","authenticity-rating":4,"attention-check":3,"intentionality-rating":5,"authenticity-intentionality-free-response":"The game felt very genuine, and with mindful effort put into it, te game was challenging in a way yet not limited in a way that the player would get frustrated, which shows good intentionality."}
